subcodes.first_line: O My Heavenly daughter! From the day that I journeyed from London until now – I have not forgotten the honourable Lady for a minute.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دختر ملکوتی من از روزیکه از لندن سفر کردم الی الان دقیقه آن خانم محترمه را
subcodes.subjects: @being a source of light; guidance, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
